name: sdxl-editing
notes_low: SDXL base plus SDXL 1.0 inpaint (diffusers-derived safetensors) for mask inpaint, canvas outpaint, and img2img edits. No Lightning or turbo LoRAs.
notes_high: Adds the SDXL refiner checkpoint for optional two-pass polishing after img2img or inpaint, plus a 4x upscaler.
description: Non-Lightning SDXL pack focused on inpainting, outpainting, and img2img editing.
